title: premna mooiensis
intro: Premna mooiensis, also known as the Bitter Premna, is a plant species native to East Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, including coughs and colds. Premna mooiensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
